glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

A {{mappings.orderType}} order needs your attention at {{mappings.taskName}} step Order no: {{mappings.orderNumber}}
Device Type: {{mappings.deviceType}}
Issue: The device, {{mappings.deviceName}} with order ID {{mappings.deviceOrderId}} has not completed {{mappings.desiredStage}} for 24 hours. Please resolve the same.
Site: {{mappings.siteId}}
Please check {{mappings.url}} for more details.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
